problems.title: 3 < 4 and 5 >= 2 or 6 != 7

problems.solution:
def main(value, value_2, value_3, value_4, value_5, value_6):
    print(value < value_2 and value_3 >= value_4 or value_5 != value_6)

    value_3 = 5

    value_4 = 2

    value_5 = 6

    value_6 = 7
    main(value, value_2, value_3, value_4, value_5, value_6)
